Ntc Of Hearing On Validity Of Election
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen P. Booth, 283-3220, appearing for plaintiffs and moving parties
Dennis Scott Zell of Fogarty and Zell, LLP, 650-652-5601, appearing for defendants and responding parties

Ruling:
Parties have reached a stipulation on the remaining issues and will submit it to the Court for signature. Due to the stipulation, the Court confirmed its prior rulings on the motion and took the remainder of Plaintiff's Carmen Tugado and Antonio Franco's Notice of Hearing to Determine Amendments to Constitution and Bylaws Null and Void and to Determine Election of June 25, 2006 Null and Void, off calendar. (301/HEK/AP) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Ntc Of Hearing On Validity Of Election
Off Calendar Nov-08-2006 Continued To Nov-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 9
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS CARMEN TUGADO AND ANTONIO FRANCO'S NOTICE OF HEARING TO DETERMINE AMENDMENTS TO CONSTITUTION AND BYLAWS NULL AND VOID AND TO DETERMINE ELECTION OF JUNE 25, 2006 NULL AND VOID.
APPEARANCE: Stephen P. Booth, Esq. 283-3220 for pltfs & moving parties Carmen Tugado and Antonio Franco; Dennis Scott Zell, Esq. of Fogarty & Zell, LLP 650/652-5601 for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court declared the election of June 25, 2006 invalid. The meeting in January 2006 to amend the constitution declared invalid. Parties to prepare a stipulation resolving all issues. Stipulation to be submitted by 4:00pm on 11/13/06 in Department 301, otherwise parties to appear on 11/14/06 at 9:00am in Department 9 at the Hall of Justice, 850 Bryant Street. (301/HEK/AP) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANTS CARMEN TUGADO AND ANTONIO FRANCO'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 BECAUSE IT IS BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION, SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING A RIGHT TO AN ACCOUNTING INDEPENDENT OF A VIOLATION OF CORPORATIONS CODE SECTION 5410 IF CROSS-COMPLAINT CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB/AP) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
